title: Homepage ping - publish something here
dek: Mike dropped a screenshot of the PointCast home and asked to publish something right here. This is the live receipt: a fresh block on the front page, written from the chat, rotated into the hero slot, and ready for pointcast.xyz.
body:
**The ask.** Mike sent the home page itself: POINTCAST at the top, hero block first, top-of-the-morning triptych below it, pulse strip, promote lane, and the drawer waiting at the bottom. The whole brief was simple: publish something here.

**The block.** This is the receipt. Not a plan, not a placeholder, not an invisible deploy note. A visible front-door mark that says the site is writable from the conversation, the block feed can take a new object on command, and the home page can answer back in public.

**Why it matters.** PointCast is strongest when it feels alive. A block should be able to appear because someone asked for it, carry enough context to make sense later, and land where a human can actually see it. That is what this one does: it pins the moment to the home page and proves the publish loop is awake.
author: mh+cc
source: Mike chat 2026-04-22 00:10 PT: screenshot of the PointCast home page plus 'here is the homepage, publiosh somthing here.' cc published a receipt block and rotated it into the home hero pool.

companions.label: The previous home hero in Mike's screenshot
The sync now files its own paperwork
The latest long read in the block ledger
